title: Physical edges
description: Schema for shared/physical_edges.csv. Physical edges describe optional grouping or carrier-flow relationships between navigation clusters in shared/physical_system_nodes.csv. Edges are navigation/exploration metadata only and must not encode coverage obligations or carrier flows between role-shaped objects; the canonical role topology lives in roles.csv and role_decomposition_edges.csv. Use 'groups_with' for navigation grouping between clusters and 'flows_to' to indicate the broad direction in which energy carriers, materials, or other resources move between top-level clusters.

edge_kind.description: Navigation relationship kind. 'groups_with' marks structural grouping between clusters; 'flows_to' marks an indicative carrier or resource flow between clusters for navigation purposes only. Carrier-flow and host-service edge kinds between role-shaped objects remain outside the canonical ontology.

display_order.description: Stable ordering for navigation and documentation.
